name: Miss kobayashi
description:
”Maybe going around in a weird hood isn’t exactly the safest thing to do out here”

After spending a bit more time than she wanted at work, she’s just trying to head back home when she spotted…..someone odd. Oh gods not again. She’s already got three dragons at home, is this really another one?!

—-————————————————————-

SO RIGHT INTO MY NOTES HUH? YEP? OK.

This is my first attempt at an already existing character so don’t expect too much. This was originally made purely for myself because I love her and you can’t tell me not to- but idk I guess I’ll just open it up for everyone

And yes, I know it says any pov but anyone who’s seen the show will know it’s lesbian galore but shhhh let us non-binary fellows have our fun too.

Shes like a bug I wanna put in a jar and stare at. Or shake around angst is fun too. I’ve been obsessed with this show since I was like 14 ok, gimme a break.

enjoy lol

(Update 04/10/25: minor first message change)
creator: Confusedcoconut
